<file path="evals/technical-qa/README.md">
# Technical QA Evaluation

This folder stores the versioned dataset and baseline artifacts for technical question evaluation.

## Structure

- `datasets/technical-qa.v1.json`: fixed evaluation dataset.
- `runs/<timestamp>/score.json`: per-run output from the evaluator.
- `runs/<timestamp>/summary.md`: per-run markdown summary.
- `baselines/<dataset_id>/<version>/score.json`: published baseline for direct comparison.
- `baselines/<dataset_id>/<version>/summary.md`: markdown summary for the baseline.
- `baselines/<dataset_id>/index.json`: baseline version index.

## Run

From `backend/`:

```bash
python scripts/eval_technical_qa.py --compare-baseline
```

Offline recurring run (no API dependency):

```bash
python scripts/eval_technical_qa.py \
  --mode offline-codebase \
  --repo-root .. \
  --compare-baseline \
  --gate-on-regression \
  --require-baseline
```

To publish a new baseline:

```bash
python scripts/eval_technical_qa.py \
  --mode offline-codebase \
  --repo-root .. \
  --publish-baseline \
  --compare-baseline
```

## Regression gate

When `--gate-on-regression` is enabled, the run fails if any configured threshold is violated:

- pass rate drop (`--max-pass-rate-drop`, default `0.02`)
- citation coverage drop (`--max-citation-coverage-drop`, default `0.02`)
- p95 latency increase (`--max-p95-latency-increase-ms`, default `250`)

If `--require-baseline` is set and baseline is missing, the gate fails.
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-ab-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus A/B — Overview",
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 36,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "templating": {
    "list": [
      {
        "type": "query",
        "name": "experiment_id",
        "label": "Experiment ID",
        "datasource": "Prometheus",
        "query": "label_values(ab_experiment_results_total, experiment_id)",
        "refresh": 2
      }
    ]
  },
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "graph",
      "title": "Results per Arm",
      "datasource": "Prometheus",
      "gridPos": { "x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 12, "h": 8 },
      "targets": [
        { "expr": "sum(rate(ab_experiment_results_total{experiment_id=\"$experiment_id\"}[5m])) by (arm_id)", "legendFormat": "arm {{arm_id}}" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "graph",
      "title": "Feedback per Arm",
      "datasource": "Prometheus",
      "gridPos": { "x": 12, "y": 0, "w": 12, "h": 8 },
      "targets": [
        { "expr": "sum(rate(ab_experiment_feedback_total{experiment_id=\"$experiment_id\"}[5m])) by (arm_id)", "legendFormat": "arm {{arm_id}}" }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-audit-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus Audit Overview",
  "tags": ["janus", "audit"],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 38,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Total Audit Events",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 6, "h": 6},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum(janus_audit_events_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Events by Action",
      "gridPos": {"x": 6, "y": 0, "w": 9, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (action) (janus_audit_events_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Events by Status",
      "gridPos": {"x": 15, "y": 0, "w": 9, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (status) (janus_audit_events_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "timeseries",
      "title": "Audit Event Rate (events/s) by Action",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 6, "w": 24, "h": 8},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (action) (rate(janus_audit_events_total[5m]))", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Top Endpoints",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 14, "w": 24, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "topk(10, sum by (endpoint) (janus_audit_events_total))", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-broker-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus Broker Overview",
  "tags": ["janus", "broker"],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 38,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Connection Errors",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 6, "h": 6},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum(broker_connection_errors_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Published by Queue",
      "gridPos": {"x": 6, "y": 0, "w": 9, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (queue) (broker_messages_published_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Consumed by Queue",
      "gridPos": {"x": 15, "y": 0, "w": 9, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (queue) (broker_messages_consumed_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "timeseries",
      "title": "Publish Rate (msgs/s)",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 6, "w": 12, "h": 8},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (queue) (rate(broker_messages_published_total[5m]))", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "timeseries",
      "title": "Consume Rate (msgs/s)",
      "gridPos": {"x": 12, "y": 6, "w": 12, "h": 8},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (queue) (rate(broker_messages_consumed_total[5m]))", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Consume Errors by Queue",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 14, "w": 24, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (queue) (broker_consume_errors_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-chat-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus Chat Overview",
  "tags": ["janus", "chat"],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 38,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Quota Enforced",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 6, "h": 6},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum(chat_index_quota_enforced_total)", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Retention Deletions",
      "gridPos": {"x": 6, "y": 0, "w": 6, "h": 6},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum(chat_index_retention_deletions_total)", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "timeseries",
      "title": "Quota Enforced Rate (events/min)",
      "gridPos": {"x": 12, "y": 0, "w": 12, "h": 8},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum(rate(chat_index_quota_enforced_total[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "timeseries",
      "title": "Retention Deletions Rate (events/min)",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 8, "w": 12, "h": 8},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum(rate(chat_index_retention_deletions_total[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-documents-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus Documents Overview",
  "tags": ["janus", "documents"],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 38,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Files Indexed",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 6, "h": 6},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum(doc_ingest_files_total{status=\"indexed\"})", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Files Empty",
      "gridPos": {"x": 6, "y": 0, "w": 6, "h": 6},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum(doc_ingest_files_total{status=\"empty\"})", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Files Quota Exceeded",
      "gridPos": {"x": 12, "y": 0, "w": 6, "h": 6},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum(doc_ingest_files_total{status=\"quota_exceeded\"})", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Points Indexed",
      "gridPos": {"x": 18, "y": 0, "w": 6, "h": 6},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum(doc_ingest_points_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Files by Status",
      "gridPos": {"x": 18, "y": 0, "w": 6, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (status) (doc_ingest_files_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "timeseries",
      "title": "Points Indexed Rate (pts/s)",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 6, "w": 8, "h": 8},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum(rate(doc_ingest_points_total[5m]))", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "timeseries",
      "title": "Files Quota Exceeded (rate/min)",
      "gridPos": {"x": 8, "y": 6, "w": 8, "h": 8},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum(rate(doc_ingest_files_total{status=\"quota_exceeded\"}[5m]))", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "heatmap",
      "title": "Ingest Latency (seconds)",
      "gridPos": {"x": 16, "y": 6, "w": 8, "h": 8},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (le) (rate(doc_ingest_latency_seconds_bucket[5m]))", "refId": "A"}
      ],
      "options": {"legend": {"show": true}}
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-documents-pipeline-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus Documents Pipeline Latency",
  "tags": ["janus", "documents", "pipeline"],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 38,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "heatmap",
      "title": "Extract Latency",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 8, "h": 8},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum by (le) (rate(doc_ingest_latency_seconds_bucket[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "heatmap",
      "title": "Chunk Latency",
      "gridPos": {"x": 8, "y": 0, "w": 8, "h": 8},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum by (le) (rate(doc_ingest_latency_seconds_bucket[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "heatmap",
      "title": "Embed Latency",
      "gridPos": {"x": 16, "y": 0, "w": 8, "h": 8},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum by (le) (rate(doc_ingest_latency_seconds_bucket[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Chunks per Ingest",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 8, "w": 24, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum(doc_ingest_chunks_count)", "refId": "A"}]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-documents-user-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus Documents by User",
  "tags": ["janus", "documents", "user"],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 38,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Points Indexed per User",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 12, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "topk(10, sum by (user_id) (doc_ingest_points_user_total))", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Files Indexed per User",
      "gridPos": {"x": 12, "y": 0, "w": 12, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "topk(10, sum by (user_id) (doc_ingest_files_user_total{status=\"indexed\"}))", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "timeseries",
      "title": "Ingest Rate by User (pts/s)",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 6, "w": 24, "h": 8},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (user_id) (rate(doc_ingest_points_user_total[5m]))", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-llm-performance.json">
{
  "title": "Janus - LLM Performance & Cost",
  "tags": [
    "janus",
    "llm",
    "performance"
  ],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 16,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "30s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "title": "Provider Selection Distribution",
      "type": "piechart",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 0,
        "w": 8,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "sum by (provider) (increase(llm_router_model_selected_total[1h]))",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{provider}}"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "title": "Requests by Priority",
      "type": "piechart",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 8,
        "y": 0,
        "w": 8,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "sum by (priority) (increase(llm_router_model_selected_total[1h]))",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{priority}}"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "title": "Requests by Role",
      "type": "piechart",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 16,
        "y": 0,
        "w": 8,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "sum by (role) (increase(llm_requests_total[1h]))",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{role}}"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "title": "Success Rate by Provider",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 8,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "rate(llm_requests_total{outcome=\"success\"}[5m]) / rate(llm_requests_total[5m]) * 100",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{provider}} - {{model}}"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "percent",
          "label": "Success Rate",
          "min": 0,
          "max": 100
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "title": "Failure Distribution by Exception Type",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 12,
        "y": 8,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "rate(llm_requests_total{outcome=\"failure\"}[5m])",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{provider}} - {{exception_type}}"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "ops",
          "label": "Failures/sec"
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 6,
      "title": "Latency Heatmap by Provider",
      "type": "heatmap",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 16,
        "w": 24,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "rate(llm_request_latency_seconds_bucket[5m])",
          "refId": "A",
          "format": "heatmap",
          "legendFormat": "{{provider}}"
        }
      ],
      "yAxis": {
        "format": "s"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": 7,
      "title": "Token Consumption Rate",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 24,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "rate(llm_tokens_total{direction=\"in\"}[5m])",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{provider}} - Input"
        },
        {
          "expr": "rate(llm_tokens_total{direction=\"out\"}[5m])",
          "refId": "B",
          "legendFormat": "{{provider}} - Output"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "ops",
          "label": "Tokens/sec"
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 8,
      "title": "Estimated Cost (Tokens/Hour)",
      "type": "stat",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 12,
        "y": 24,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "sum(increase(llm_tokens_total[1h])) by (provider)",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{provider}}"
        }
      ],
      "options": {
        "colorMode": "value",
        "graphMode": "area",
        "orientation": "horizontal"
      },
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "unit": "short",
          "thresholds": {
            "mode": "absolute",
            "steps": [
              {
                "value": 0,
                "color": "green"
              },
              {
                "value": 100000,
                "color": "yellow"
              },
              {
                "value": 500000,
                "color": "orange"
              },
              {
                "value": 1000000,
                "color": "red"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "id": 9,
      "title": "Fallback Events",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 32,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "rate(llm_router_model_selected_total{priority=\"fallback\"}[5m])",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "Fallback to {{provider}}"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "ops",
          "label": "Fallbacks/sec"
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 10,
      "title": "Cache Hit Rate",
      "type": "stat",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 12,
        "y": 32,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "(sum(rate(llm_cache_hits_total[5m])) / sum(rate(llm_cache_requests_total[5m]))) * 100",
          "refId": "A"
        }
      ],
      "options": {
        "colorMode": "background",
        "graphMode": "area"
      },
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "unit": "percent",
          "min": 0,
          "max": 100,
          "thresholds": {
            "mode": "absolute",
            "steps": [
              {
                "value": 0,
                "color": "red"
              },
              {
                "value": 50,
                "color": "yellow"
              },
              {
                "value": 80,
                "color": "green"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus - System Overview",
  "tags": [
    "janus",
    "overview"
  ],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 16,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "title": "System Health Status",
      "type": "stat",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 0,
        "w": 6,
        "h": 4
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "up{job=\"janus\"}",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "Janus API"
        }
      ],
      "options": {
        "colorMode": "background",
        "graphMode": "none",
        "textMode": "value"
      },
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "thresholds": {
            "mode": "absolute",
            "steps": [
              {
                "value": 0,
                "color": "red"
              },
              {
                "value": 1,
                "color": "green"
              }
            ]
          },
          "mappings": [
            {
              "type": "value",
              "value": "1",
              "text": "HEALTHY"
            },
            {
              "type": "value",
              "value": "0",
              "text": "DOWN"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "title": "Active Agents",
      "type": "stat",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 6,
        "y": 0,
        "w": 6,
        "h": 4
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "multi_agent_active_agents",
          "refId": "A"
        }
      ],
      "options": {
        "colorMode": "value",
        "graphMode": "area"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "title": "Circuit Breakers Status",
      "type": "stat",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 12,
        "y": 0,
        "w": 6,
        "h": 4
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "sum(janus_resilience_circuit_state{state=\"OPEN\"})",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "Open Circuits"
        }
      ],
      "options": {
        "colorMode": "background",
        "graphMode": "none"
      },
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "thresholds": {
            "mode": "absolute",
            "steps": [
              {
                "value": 0,
                "color": "green"
              },
              {
                "value": 1,
                "color": "yellow"
              },
              {
                "value": 3,
                "color": "red"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "title": "Error Rate",
      "type": "stat",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 18,
        "y": 0,
        "w": 6,
        "h": 4
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "rate(llm_requests_total{outcome=\"failure\"}[5m])",
          "refId": "A"
        }
      ],
      "options": {
        "colorMode": "background",
        "graphMode": "area"
      },
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "unit": "reqps",
          "thresholds": {
            "mode": "absolute",
            "steps": [
              {
                "value": 0,
                "color": "green"
              },
              {
                "value": 0.5,
                "color": "yellow"
              },
              {
                "value": 2,
                "color": "red"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "title": "LLM Requests Rate by Provider",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 4,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "rate(llm_requests_total{outcome=\"success\"}[5m])",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{provider}} - {{model}}"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "reqps",
          "label": "Requests/sec"
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 6,
      "title": "LLM Request Latency (P95)",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 12,
        "y": 4,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(llm_request_latency_seconds_bucket[5m]))",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{provider}} - P95"
        },
        {
          "expr": "histogram_quantile(0.50, rate(llm_request_latency_seconds_bucket[5m]))",
          "refId": "B",
          "legendFormat": "{{provider}} - P50"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "s",
          "label": "Latency"
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 7,
      "title": "Multi-Agent Tasks by Status",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 12,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "rate(multi_agent_tasks_total[5m])",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{agent_role}} - {{status}}"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "ops",
          "label": "Tasks/sec"
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 8,
      "title": "Task Duration by Agent Role",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 12,
        "y": 12,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(multi_agent_task_duration_seconds_bucket[5m]))",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{agent_role}} - P95"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "s",
          "label": "Duration"
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 9,
      "title": "Memory Operations Rate",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 20,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "rate(memory_operations_total[5m])",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{operation}} - {{outcome}}"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "ops",
          "label": "Operations/sec"
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 10,
      "title": "Circuit Breaker Failures",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 12,
        "y": 20,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "janus_resilience_failure_count",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{operation}}"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "short",
          "label": "Failure Count"
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 11,
      "title": "Retry Operations",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 28,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "rate(janus_resilience_retries_total[5m])",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{operation}} - {{exception_type}}"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "ops",
          "label": "Retries/sec"
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 12,
      "title": "LLM Token Usage",
      "type": "graph",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 12,
        "y": 28,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "rate(llm_tokens_total[5m])",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{provider}} - {{direction}}"
        }
      ],
      "yaxes": [
        {
          "format": "ops",
          "label": "Tokens/sec"
        },
        {
          "format": "short"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-productivity-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus Productivity — Overview",
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 36,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "graph",
      "title": "Google Productivity Operations",
      "datasource": "Prometheus",
      "gridPos": { "x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 12, "h": 8 },
      "targets": [
        { "expr": "sum(rate(google_productivity_operations_total{type=\"calendar_add\"}[5m]))", "legendFormat": "Calendar add" },
        { "expr": "sum(rate(google_productivity_operations_total{type=\"mail_send\"}[5m]))", "legendFormat": "Mail send" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "graph",
      "title": "Google Productivity Errors",
      "datasource": "Prometheus",
      "gridPos": { "x": 12, "y": 0, "w": 12, "h": 8 },
      "targets": [
        { "expr": "sum(rate(google_productivity_operations_error_total{type=\"calendar_add\"}[5m]))", "legendFormat": "Calendar add errors" },
        { "expr": "sum(rate(google_productivity_operations_error_total{type=\"mail_send\"}[5m]))", "legendFormat": "Mail send errors" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "graph",
      "title": "Operation Latency (p95)",
      "datasource": "Prometheus",
      "gridPos": { "x": 0, "y": 8, "w": 12, "h": 8 },
      "targets": [
        { "expr": "histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(google_productivity_operation_latency_seconds_bucket{type=\"calendar_add\"}[5m])) by (le))", "legendFormat": "Calendar add p95" },
        { "expr": "histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(google_productivity_operation_latency_seconds_bucket{type=\"mail_send\"}[5m])) by (le))", "legendFormat": "Mail send p95" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Indexed Points (Qdrant)",
      "datasource": "Prometheus",
      "gridPos": { "x": 12, "y": 8, "w": 12, "h": 8 },
      "targets": [
        { "expr": "sum(increase(google_calendar_events_indexed_total[1h]))", "legendFormat": "Calendar indexed (1h)" },
        { "expr": "sum(increase(google_mail_messages_indexed_total[1h]))", "legendFormat": "Mail indexed (1h)" }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-productivity-user-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus Productivity — User Overview",
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 36,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "templating": {
    "list": [
      {
        "type": "query",
        "name": "user_id",
        "label": "User ID",
        "datasource": "Prometheus",
        "query": "label_values(productivity_worker_user_events_total, user_id)",
        "refresh": 2
      }
    ]
  },
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "graph",
      "title": "User Events (ok)",
      "datasource": "Prometheus",
      "gridPos": { "x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 12, "h": 8 },
      "targets": [
        { "expr": "sum(rate(productivity_worker_user_events_total{user_id=\"$user_id\",op=\"calendar_send\",status=\"ok\"}[5m]))", "legendFormat": "Calendar send" },
        { "expr": "sum(rate(productivity_worker_user_events_total{user_id=\"$user_id\",op=\"mail_send\",status=\"ok\"}[5m]))", "legendFormat": "Mail send" },
        { "expr": "sum(rate(productivity_worker_user_events_total{user_id=\"$user_id\",op=\"calendar_index\",status=\"ok\"}[5m]))", "legendFormat": "Calendar index" },
        { "expr": "sum(rate(productivity_worker_user_events_total{user_id=\"$user_id\",op=\"mail_index\",status=\"ok\"}[5m]))", "legendFormat": "Mail index" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "graph",
      "title": "User Events (errors)",
      "datasource": "Prometheus",
      "gridPos": { "x": 12, "y": 0, "w": 12, "h": 8 },
      "targets": [
        { "expr": "sum(rate(productivity_worker_user_events_total{user_id=\"$user_id\",op=\"calendar_send\",status=\"error\"}[5m]))", "legendFormat": "Calendar send errors" },
        { "expr": "sum(rate(productivity_worker_user_events_total{user_id=\"$user_id\",op=\"mail_send\",status=\"error\"}[5m]))", "legendFormat": "Mail send errors" }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "graph",
      "title": "Latency p95 (per user)",
      "datasource": "Prometheus",
      "gridPos": { "x": 0, "y": 8, "w": 24, "h": 8 },
      "targets": [
        { "expr": "histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(productivity_worker_user_latency_seconds_bucket{user_id=\"$user_id\",op=\"calendar_send\"}[5m])) by (le))", "legendFormat": "Calendar send p95" },
        { "expr": "histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(productivity_worker_user_latency_seconds_bucket{user_id=\"$user_id\",op=\"mail_send\"}[5m])) by (le))", "legendFormat": "Mail send p95" }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-productivity-worker-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus Productivity Worker Latency",
  "tags": ["janus", "productivity", "worker"],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 38,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "heatmap",
      "title": "Worker Latency (seconds)",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 24, "h": 8},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (le) (rate(productivity_worker_latency_seconds_bucket[5m]))", "refId": "A"}
      ],
      "options": {"legend": {"show": true}}
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Worker Events per User",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 8, "w": 24, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "topk(10, sum by (user_id,op) (productivity_worker_user_events_total))", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-rag-pipeline-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus RAG Pipeline Overview",
  "tags": ["janus", "rag", "pipeline"],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 38,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "heatmap",
      "title": "Parse Latency by Type",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 8, "h": 8},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum by (le,type) (rate(doc_parse_latency_seconds_bucket[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Parse Outcomes",
      "gridPos": {"x": 8, "y": 0, "w": 8, "h": 8},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum by (type,outcome) (rate(doc_parse_total[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "heatmap",
      "title": "Embedding Latency by Provider",
      "gridPos": {"x": 16, "y": 0, "w": 8, "h": 8},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum by (le,provider,outcome) (rate(emb_latency_seconds_bucket[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Embedding Errors by Provider",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 8, "w": 8, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum by (provider) (rate(emb_requests_total{outcome=\"error\"}[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "heatmap",
      "title": "RAG Latency by Endpoint",
      "gridPos": {"x": 8, "y": 8, "w": 8, "h": 6},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum by (le,endpoint,outcome) (rate(rag_latency_seconds_bucket[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "RAG Results per Endpoint",
      "gridPos": {"x": 16, "y": 8, "w": 8, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum by (endpoint) (rate(rag_results_total[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    },
    {
      "type": "heatmap",
      "title": "Search Scores by Endpoint",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 14, "w": 24, "h": 8},
      "targets": [{"expr": "sum by (le,endpoint) (rate(rag_search_scores_bucket[5m]))", "refId": "A"}]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-slo-domains-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus - Domain SLO Overview",
  "tags": [
    "janus",
    "slo",
    "oq-002"
  ],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 16,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "title": "Error Rate by Domain (5m, %)",
      "type": "timeseries",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 0,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "(sum(rate(janus_domain_requests_total{outcome=\"error\",domain=~\"chat|rag|tools|workers\"}[5m])) by (domain) / clamp_min(sum(rate(janus_domain_requests_total{domain=~\"chat|rag|tools|workers\"}[5m])) by (domain), 0.001)) * 100",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{domain}}"
        }
      ],
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "unit": "percent",
          "thresholds": {
            "mode": "absolute",
            "steps": [
              {
                "color": "green",
                "value": 0
              },
              {
                "color": "yellow",
                "value": 3
              },
              {
                "color": "red",
                "value": 5
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "title": "Latency P95 by Domain (5m, ms)",
      "type": "timeseries",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 12,
        "y": 0,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(janus_domain_request_latency_seconds_bucket{domain=~\"chat|rag|tools|workers\"}[5m])) by (le, domain)) * 1000",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{domain}}"
        }
      ],
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "unit": "ms"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "title": "Traffic by Domain (req/s)",
      "type": "timeseries",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 0,
        "y": 8,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "sum(rate(janus_domain_requests_total{domain=~\"chat|rag|tools|workers\"}[5m])) by (domain)",
          "refId": "A",
          "legendFormat": "{{domain}}"
        }
      ],
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "unit": "reqps"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "title": "Active Domain SLO Alerts",
      "type": "stat",
      "gridPos": {
        "x": 12,
        "y": 8,
        "w": 12,
        "h": 8
      },
      "targets": [
        {
          "expr": "sum(ALERTS{alertname=~\"JanusDomain.*\",alertstate=\"firing\"})",
          "refId": "A"
        }
      ],
      "options": {
        "colorMode": "background",
        "graphMode": "none",
        "textMode": "value"
      },
      "fieldConfig": {
        "defaults": {
          "thresholds": {
            "mode": "absolute",
            "steps": [
              {
                "color": "green",
                "value": 0
              },
              {
                "color": "yellow",
                "value": 1
              },
              {
                "color": "red",
                "value": 3
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-training-overview.json">

<file path="grafana/dashboards/janus-user-overview.json">
{
  "title": "Janus User Overview",
  "tags": ["janus", "user"],
  "timezone": "browser",
  "schemaVersion": 38,
  "version": 1,
  "refresh": "10s",
  "panels": [
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "Memory Ops (total)",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 8, "h": 6},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum(memory_operations_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "bargauge",
      "title": "Memory Ops by Operation",
      "gridPos": {"x": 8, "y": 0, "w": 16, "h": 6},
      "options": {"displayMode": "gradient"},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (operation) (memory_operations_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "heatmap",
      "title": "Memory Latency (seconds)",
      "gridPos": {"x": 0, "y": 6, "w": 12, "h": 8},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum by (le) (rate(memory_operation_latency_seconds_bucket[5m]))", "refId": "A"}
      ],
      "options": {"legend": {"show": true}}
    },
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "LLM Cache Requests",
      "gridPos": {"x": 12, "y": 6, "w": 6, "h": 8},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum(llm_cache_requests_total)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "stat",
      "title": "LLM Cache Hit Rate",
      "gridPos": {"x": 18, "y": 6, "w": 6, "h": 8},
      "targets": [
        {"expr": "sum(llm_cache_hits_total) / clamp_min(sum(llm_cache_requests_total), 1)", "refId": "A"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
</file>

<file path="grafana/provisioning/dashboards/dashboards.yml">
apiVersion: 1

providers:
  - name: 'Janus Dashboards'
    orgId: 1
    folder: 'Janus'
    type: file
    disableDeletion: false
    allowUiUpdates: true
    updateIntervalSeconds: 30
    options:
      path: /var/lib/grafana/dashboards
      recursive: true
</file>

<file path="grafana/provisioning/datasources/datasource.yml">
apiVersion: 1

datasources:
  - name: Prometheus
    type: prometheus
    access: proxy
    url: http://prometheus:9090
    isDefault: true
    editable: true
</file>

<file path="grafana/provisioning/datasources/loki.yml">
apiVersion: 1
datasources:
  - name: Loki
    type: loki
    access: proxy
    url: http://loki:3100
    isDefault: false
    version: 1
    editable: true
</file>

<file path="grafana/provisioning/datasources/tempo.yml">
apiVersion: 1
datasources:
  - name: Tempo
    type: tempo
    access: proxy
    url: http://tempo:3200
    isDefault: false
    jsonData:
      tracesToLogs:
        datasourceUid: Loki
        spanStartTimeShift: '1m'
        spanEndTimeShift: '1m'
        tags: ['trace_id']
      serviceMap:
        datasourceUid: Prometheus
</file>

<file path="http/sprint/Sprint 1.http">
###
    # SPRINT 1: Identidade e Acesso (Auth, Users, Profiles, Consents)
    # Fluxos E2E reais + cobertura complementar de endpoints da sprint
    # Modulos: Auth, Users, Profiles, Consents
    ###

    @host = http://localhost:8000
@api_v1_prefix = /api/v1
@token = 
@admin_token = 
@correlation_id = {{$timestamp}}
@client_version = 2.0.0
@actor_user_id = 1
@user_id_int = 1
@user_id_str = 1
@target_user_id = 1
@conversation_id = conv-placeholder
@message_id = msg-placeholder
@goal_id = goal-placeholder
@run_id = 1
@task_id = task-placeholder
@agent_id = agent-placeholder
@doc_id = doc-placeholder
@experiment_id = 1
@arm_id = 1
@model_id = demo-model
@request_id = req-demo
@action_id = 1
@consent_id = 1
@queue_name = janus.knowledge.consolidation
@queue_name_missing = default

@s1_email = sprint1@example.com
@s1_user_id = 1
@s1_token = 


############################################
# 0) Preflight de autenticacao
############################################
# @name auth_local_me_preflight
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/auth/local/me
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Preflight auth/local/me: 200 e JSON", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200, "Forneca @token valido (auth/local/me != 200)");
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("application/json"));
});
try {
  const body = response.body.json();
  if (body && body.id) client.global.set("actor_user_id", String(body.id));
} catch (e) {}
%}
############################################
# Indice de endpoints cobertos nesta sprint
############################################
# - [Auth] POST /api/v1/auth/firebase/exchange
# - [Auth] POST /api/v1/auth/local/login
# - [Auth] GET /api/v1/auth/local/me
# - [Auth] POST /api/v1/auth/local/register
# - [Auth] POST /api/v1/auth/local/request-reset
# - [Auth] POST /api/v1/auth/local/reset
# - [Auth] POST /api/v1/auth/supabase/exchange
# - [Auth] POST /api/v1/auth/token
# - [Consents] GET /api/v1/consents/
# - [Consents] POST /api/v1/consents/
# - [Consents] POST /api/v1/consents/{consent_id}/revoke
# - [Profiles] POST /api/v1/profiles/
# - [Profiles] GET /api/v1/profiles/{user_id}
# - [Users] POST /api/v1/users/
# - [Users] GET /api/v1/users/{user_id}
# - [Users] GET /api/v1/users/{user_id}/consents
# - [Users] POST /api/v1/users/{user_id}/consents
# - [Users] DELETE /api/v1/users/{user_id}/consents/{scope}
# - [Users] POST /api/v1/users/{user_id}/roles

############################################
# 1) Auth local: registro, login e self-profile
############################################
# @name s1_local_register
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/auth/local/register
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

{
  "email": "sprint1_{{$timestamp}}@example.com",
  "password": "StrongPass123!",
  "username": "sprint1_{{$timestamp}}",
  "full_name": "Sprint One",
  "terms": true
}

> {%
client.test("local/register: 200 ou 409", function() {
  client.assert([200,409].includes(response.status));
});
if (response.status === 200) {
  const b = response.body.json();
  client.global.set("s1_token", b.token);
  client.global.set("s1_user_id", String(b.user.id));
  if (b.user.email) client.global.set("s1_email", b.user.email);
}
%}

###
# @name s1_local_login
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/auth/local/login
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

{
  "email": "{{s1_email}}",
  "password": "StrongPass123!"
}

> {%
client.test("local/login: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); });
const b = response.body.json();
client.global.set("s1_token", b.token);
client.global.set("s1_user_id", String(b.user.id));
client.global.set("user_id_int", String(b.user.id));
client.global.set("user_id_str", String(b.user.id));
%}

###
# @name s1_local_me_with_user_token
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/auth/local/me
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{s1_token}}

> {%
client.test("local/me com token da sprint: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); });
const b = response.body.json();
client.global.set("s1_user_id", String(b.id));
client.global.set("user_id_int", String(b.id));
client.global.set("user_id_str", String(b.id));
%}

############################################
# 2) Users + Profiles + Consents (happy path)
############################################
# @name s1_users_create
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/users/
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

{
  "email": "extra_{{$timestamp}}@example.com",
  "display_name": "Extra User"
}

> {%
client.test("users/create: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); });
const b = response.body.json();
client.global.set("s1_extra_user_id", String(b.id));
%}

###
# @name s1_profile_upsert
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/profiles/
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

{
  "user_id": {{user_id_int}},
  "timezone": "America/Sao_Paulo",
  "language": "pt-BR",
  "style_prefs": "conciso"
}

> {% client.test("profiles/upsert: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); }); %}

###
# @name s1_profile_get
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/profiles/{{user_id_int}}
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {% client.test("profiles/get: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); }); %}

###
# @name s1_users_add_consent
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/users/{{user_id_int}}/consents
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{s1_token}}
X-User-Id: {{s1_user_id}}

{
  "scope": "notes.read",
  "granted": true
}

> {% client.test("users/consents add: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); }); %}

}

<file path="http/sprint/Sprint 10.http">
###
    # SPRINT 10: Aprendizado e Produtividade (Learning + Productivity)
    # Fluxos E2E reais + cobertura complementar de endpoints da sprint
    # Modulos: Learning, Productivity
    ###

    @host = http://localhost:8000
@api_v1_prefix = /api/v1
@token = 
@admin_token = 
@correlation_id = {{$timestamp}}
@client_version = 2.0.0
@actor_user_id = 1
@user_id_int = 1
@user_id_str = 1
@target_user_id = 1
@conversation_id = conv-placeholder
@message_id = msg-placeholder
@goal_id = goal-placeholder
@run_id = 1
@task_id = task-placeholder
@agent_id = agent-placeholder
@doc_id = doc-placeholder
@experiment_id = 1
@arm_id = 1
@model_id = demo-model
@request_id = req-demo
@action_id = 1
@consent_id = 1
@queue_name = janus.knowledge.consolidation
@queue_name_missing = default


############################################
# 0) Preflight de autenticacao
############################################
# @name auth_local_me_preflight
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/auth/local/me
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Preflight auth/local/me: 200 e JSON", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200, "Forneca @token valido (auth/local/me != 200)");
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("application/json"));
});
try {
  const body = response.body.json();
  if (body && body.id) client.global.set("actor_user_id", String(body.id));
} catch (e) {}
%}
############################################
# Indice de endpoints cobertos nesta sprint
############################################
# - [Learning] GET /api/v1/learning/dataset/preview
# - [Learning] GET /api/v1/learning/dataset/version
# - [Learning] POST /api/v1/learning/evaluate
# - [Learning] GET /api/v1/learning/experiments
# - [Learning] GET /api/v1/learning/experiments/{experiment_id}
# - [Learning] POST /api/v1/learning/harvest
# - [Learning] GET /api/v1/learning/health
# - [Learning] GET /api/v1/learning/models
# - [Learning] GET /api/v1/learning/models/{model_id}
# - [Learning] GET /api/v1/learning/stats
# - [Learning] POST /api/v1/learning/train
# - [Learning] GET /api/v1/learning/training/status
# - [Productivity] GET /api/v1/productivity/calendar/events
# - [Productivity] POST /api/v1/productivity/calendar/events/add
# - [Productivity] GET /api/v1/productivity/limits/status
# - [Productivity] GET /api/v1/productivity/mail/messages
# - [Productivity] POST /api/v1/productivity/mail/messages/send
# - [Productivity] GET /api/v1/productivity/notes
# - [Productivity] POST /api/v1/productivity/notes/add
# - [Productivity] POST /api/v1/productivity/oauth/google/callback
# - [Productivity] POST /api/v1/productivity/oauth/google/refresh
# - [Productivity] GET /api/v1/productivity/oauth/google/start
# - [Productivity] POST /api/v1/productivity/oauth/google/start

###

    # Modulos: Collaboration, Collaboration - Workspace
    ###

    @host = http://localhost:8000
@api_v1_prefix = /api/v1
@token =

@client_version = 2.0.0

  client.assert(response.status === 200, "Forneca @token valido (auth/local/me != 200)");
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("application/json"));
});
try {

<file path="http/sprint/Sprint 12.http">
###
    # SPRINT 12: Autonomia, Historico, Pending Actions e Deploy
    # Fluxos E2E reais + cobertura complementar de endpoints da sprint
    # Modulos: Autonomy, AutonomyHistory, PendingActions, Deployment
    ###

    @host = http://localhost:8000
@api_v1_prefix = /api/v1
@token = 
@admin_token = 
@correlation_id = {{$timestamp}}
@client_version = 2.0.0
@actor_user_id = 1
@user_id_int = 1
@user_id_str = 1
@target_user_id = 1
@conversation_id = conv-placeholder
@message_id = msg-placeholder
@goal_id = goal-placeholder
@run_id = 1
@task_id = task-placeholder
@agent_id = agent-placeholder
@doc_id = doc-placeholder
@experiment_id = 1
@arm_id = 1
@model_id = demo-model
@request_id = req-demo
@action_id = 1
@consent_id = 1
@queue_name = janus.knowledge.consolidation
@queue_name_missing = default


############################################
# 0) Preflight de autenticacao
############################################
# @name auth_local_me_preflight
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/auth/local/me
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Preflight auth/local/me: 200 e JSON", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200, "Forneca @token valido (auth/local/me != 200)");
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("application/json"));
});
try {
  const body = response.body.json();
  if (body && body.id) client.global.set("actor_user_id", String(body.id));
} catch (e) {}
%}
############################################
# Indice de endpoints cobertos nesta sprint
############################################
# - [Autonomy] GET /api/v1/autonomy/goals
# - [Autonomy] POST /api/v1/autonomy/goals
# - [Autonomy] DELETE /api/v1/autonomy/goals/{goal_id}
# - [Autonomy] GET /api/v1/autonomy/goals/{goal_id}
# - [Autonomy] PATCH /api/v1/autonomy/goals/{goal_id}/status
# - [Autonomy] GET /api/v1/autonomy/plan
# - [Autonomy] PUT /api/v1/autonomy/plan
# - [Autonomy] PUT /api/v1/autonomy/policy
# - [Autonomy] POST /api/v1/autonomy/start
# - [Autonomy] GET /api/v1/autonomy/status
# - [Autonomy] POST /api/v1/autonomy/stop
# - [AutonomyHistory] GET /api/v1/autonomy/history/runs
# - [AutonomyHistory] GET /api/v1/autonomy/history/runs/{run_id}
# - [AutonomyHistory] GET /api/v1/autonomy/history/runs/{run_id}/steps
# - [Deployment] POST /api/v1/deployment/precheck
# - [Deployment] POST /api/v1/deployment/publish
# - [Deployment] POST /api/v1/deployment/rollback
# - [Deployment] POST /api/v1/deployment/stage
# - [PendingActions] GET /api/v1/pending_actions/
# - [PendingActions] POST /api/v1/pending_actions/action/{action_id}/approve
# - [PendingActions] POST /api/v1/pending_actions/action/{action_id}/reject
# - [PendingActions] POST /api/v1/pending_actions/{thread_id}/approve
# - [PendingActions] POST /api/v1/pending_actions/{thread_id}/reject

############################################
# 1) Autonomy + History + Pending Actions + Deployment
############################################
# @name s12_goals_create
# DOCKER-SAFE: bloco desativado (mutacao/carga/external)
# POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/autonomy/goals
# Content-Type: application/json
# X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
# User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
# Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
#
# {
#   "title": "Sprint 12 goal",
#   "description": "Validar autonomia/historico",
#   "priority": 5
# }
#
# > {%
# client.test("autonomy/goals create: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); });
# const b = response.body.json();
# if (b.id) client.global.set("goal_id", String(b.id));
# %}
#
###
# @name s12_goals_list
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/autonomy/goals
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {% client.test("autonomy/goals list: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); }); %}

###
# @name s12_goal_get
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/autonomy/goals/{{goal_id}}
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {% client.test("autonomy/goals get: 200 ou 404", function() { client.assert([200,404].includes(response.status)); }); %}

###
# @name s12_goal_status_update

# PATCH {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/autonomy/goals/{{goal_id}}/status

# User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
# Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

# {
#   "status": "in_progress"
# }
#
# > {% client.test("autonomy/goals status update: 200 ou 404", function() { client.assert([200,404].includes(response.status)); }); %}
#
###
# @name s12_autonomy_plan_get
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/autonomy/plan
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {% client.test("autonomy/plan: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); }); %}

###
# @name s12_autonomy_policy_update

# PUT {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/autonomy/policy
# Content-Type: application/json

# Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
#
# {
#   "risk_profile": "balanced",
#   "auto_confirm": true,
#   "max_actions_per_cycle": 2
# }
#
# > {% client.test("autonomy/policy update: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); }); %}
#
###
# @name s12_autonomy_start
# DOCKER-SAFE: bloco desativado (mutacao/carga/external)
# POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/autonomy/start
# Content-Type: application/json
# X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
# User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
# Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
#
# {
#   "interval_seconds": 15,
#   "auto_confirm": true,
#   "max_actions_per_cycle": 2,
#   "max_seconds_per_cycle": 10,
#   "allowlist": ["get_current_datetime"],
#   "blocklist": [],
#   "plan": [
#     {"tool": "get_current_datetime", "args": {}}
#   ]
# }
#
# > {% client.test("autonomy/start: 200 ou 400", function() { client.assert([200,400].includes(response.status)); }); %}
#
###
# @name s12_autonomy_status
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/autonomy/status
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {% client.test("autonomy/status: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); }); %}

###
# @name s12_autonomy_stop
# DOCKER-SAFE: bloco desativado (mutacao/carga/external)
# POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/autonomy/stop
# Content-Type: application/json
# X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
# User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
# Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
#
# > {% client.test("autonomy/stop: 200 ou 400", function() { client.assert([200,400].includes(response.status)); }); %}

###
# @name s12_history_runs
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/autonomy/history/runs?limit=10
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("autonomy/history/runs: 200", function() { client.assert(response.status === 200); });
try {
  const arr = response.body.json();
  if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr.length > 0 && arr[0].id) client.global.set("run_id", String(arr[0].id));
} catch(e) {}
%}

###

GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/autonomy/history/runs/{{run_id}}
Accept: application/json

<file path="http/sprint/Sprint 13.http">
###
    # SPRINT 13: Observabilidade Operacional
    # Fluxos E2E reais + cobertura complementar de endpoints da sprint
    # Modulos: Observability
    ###

    @host = http://localhost:8000
@api_v1_prefix = /api/v1
@token = 
@admin_token = 
@correlation_id = {{$timestamp}}
@client_version = 2.0.0
@actor_user_id = 1
@user_id_int = 1
@user_id_str = 1
@target_user_id = 1
@conversation_id = conv-placeholder
@message_id = msg-placeholder
@goal_id = goal-placeholder
@run_id = 1
@task_id = task-placeholder
@agent_id = agent-placeholder
@doc_id = doc-placeholder
@experiment_id = 1
@arm_id = 1
@model_id = demo-model
@request_id = req-demo
@action_id = 1
@consent_id = 1
@queue_name = janus.knowledge.consolidation
@queue_name_missing = default


############################################
# 0) Preflight de autenticacao
############################################
# @name auth_local_me_preflight
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/auth/local/me
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Preflight auth/local/me: 200 e JSON", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200, "Forneca @token valido (auth/local/me != 200)");
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("application/json"));
});
try {
  const body = response.body.json();
  if (body && body.id) client.global.set("actor_user_id", String(body.id));
} catch (e) {}
%}
############################################
# Indice de endpoints cobertos nesta sprint
############################################
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/activity/user
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/audit/events
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/audit/export
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/errors/taxonomy
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/graph/audit
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/graph/quarantine
# - [Observability] POST /api/v1/observability/graph/quarantine/promote
# - [Observability] POST /api/v1/observability/health/check-all
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/health/components/llm_router
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/health/components/multi_agent_system
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/health/components/poison_pill_handler
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/health/system
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/llm/usage
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/metrics/summary
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/metrics/user
# - [Observability] POST /api/v1/observability/metrics/ux
# - [Observability] POST /api/v1/observability/poison-pills/cleanup
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/poison-pills/quarantined
# - [Observability] POST /api/v1/observability/poison-pills/release
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/poison-pills/stats
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/requests/{request_id}/dashboard
# - [Observability] GET /api/v1/observability/user_summary

############################################
# 1) Observabilidade operacional (happy path)
############################################

# @name s13_request_dashboard_missing

# @name s13_poison_release_invalid

#

# @name s13_graph_promote_invalid
# DOCKER-SAFE: bloco desativado (mutacao/carga/external)
# POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/observability/graph/quarantine/promote

<file path="http/sprint/Sprint 2.http">
###
    # SPRINT 2: Runtime Base, Filas e Operacao (System, Workers, Tasks)
    # Fluxos E2E reais + cobertura complementar de endpoints da sprint
    # Modulos: System, Workers, Tasks, Admin, unknown(system/overview)
    ###

    @host = http://localhost:8000
@api_v1_prefix = /api/v1
@token = 
@admin_token = 
@correlation_id = {{$timestamp}}
@client_version = 2.0.0
@actor_user_id = 1
@user_id_int = 1
@user_id_str = 1
@target_user_id = 1
@conversation_id = conv-placeholder
@message_id = msg-placeholder
@goal_id = goal-placeholder
@run_id = 1
@task_id = task-placeholder
@agent_id = agent-placeholder
@doc_id = doc-placeholder
@experiment_id = 1
@arm_id = 1
@model_id = demo-model
@request_id = req-demo
@action_id = 1
@consent_id = 1
@queue_name = janus.knowledge.consolidation
@queue_name_missing = default


############################################
# 0) Preflight de autenticacao
############################################
# @name auth_local_me_preflight
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/auth/local/me
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Preflight auth/local/me: 200 e JSON", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200, "Forneca @token valido (auth/local/me != 200)");
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("application/json"));
});
try {
  const body = response.body.json();
  if (body && body.id) client.global.set("actor_user_id", String(body.id));
} catch (e) {}
%}
############################################
# Indice de endpoints cobertos nesta sprint
############################################
# - [Admin] PATCH /api/v1/admin/config
# - [System] POST /api/v1/system/db/migrate
# - [System] GET /api/v1/system/db/validate
# - [System] GET /api/v1/system/health/services
# - [System] GET /api/v1/system/status
# - [System] GET /api/v1/system/status/user
# - [Tasks] POST /api/v1/tasks/consolidation
# - [Tasks] GET /api/v1/tasks/health/rabbitmq
# - [Tasks] GET /api/v1/tasks/queue/{queue_name}
# - [Tasks] GET /api/v1/tasks/queue/{queue_name}/policy
# - [Tasks] POST /api/v1/tasks/queue/{queue_name}/policy/reconcile
# - [Tasks] GET /api/v1/tasks/queue/{queue_name}/policy/validate
# - [Workers] POST /api/v1/workers/start-all
# - [Workers] GET /api/v1/workers/status
# - [Workers] POST /api/v1/workers/stop-all
# - [unknown] GET /api/v1/system/overview

# DOCKER-SAFE: bloco desativado (mutacao/carga/external)

# Accept: application/json
# X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
# User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
# Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
#
# > {% client.test("delete tool: 204 ou 404", function() { client.assert([204,404].includes(response.status)); }); %}

############################################
# @name s4_tool_create_invalid
# DOCKER-SAFE: bloco desativado (mutacao/carga/external)
# POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/tools/create/from-function
# Content-Type: application/json
# X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
# User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
# Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
#
# {
#   "name": "bad_tool",
#   "description": "Codigo invalido",
#   "code": "def execute(:",
#   "function_name": "execute"
# }
#
# > {% client.test("create tool invalido: 400 ou 422", function() { client.assert([400,422].includes(response.status)); }); %}

###

#   "max_iterations": 0
# }
#

#
### OPTIONAL-DESTRUCTIVE
# POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/reflexion/reset-circuit-breaker

<file path="http/sprint/Sprint 5.http">
###
    # SPRINT 5: Auto-Otimizacao e Supervisao (Optimization + Meta-Agent)
    # Fluxos E2E reais + cobertura complementar de endpoints da sprint
    # Modulos: Optimization, Meta-Agent
    ###

    @host = http://localhost:8000
@api_v1_prefix = /api/v1
@token = 
@admin_token = 
@correlation_id = {{$timestamp}}
@client_version = 2.0.0
@actor_user_id = 1
@user_id_int = 1
@user_id_str = 1
@target_user_id = 1
@conversation_id = conv-placeholder
@message_id = msg-placeholder
@goal_id = goal-placeholder
@run_id = 1
@task_id = task-placeholder
@agent_id = agent-placeholder
@doc_id = doc-placeholder
@experiment_id = 1
@arm_id = 1
@model_id = demo-model
@request_id = req-demo
@action_id = 1
@consent_id = 1
@queue_name = janus.knowledge.consolidation
@queue_name_missing = default


############################################
# 0) Preflight de autenticacao
############################################
# @name auth_local_me_preflight
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/auth/local/me
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Preflight auth/local/me: 200 e JSON", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200, "Forneca @token valido (auth/local/me != 200)");
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("application/json"));
});
try {
  const body = response.body.json();
  if (body && body.id) client.global.set("actor_user_id", String(body.id));
} catch (e) {}
%}

# Indice de endpoints cobertos nesta sprint

# - [Meta-Agent] POST /api/v1/meta-agent/analyze

# 0) Preflight de autenticacao

client.test("Preflight auth/local/me: 200 e JSON", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200, "Forneca @token valido (auth/local/me != 200)");
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("application/json"));

try {

<file path="http/sprint/Sprint 8.http">
###
    # SPRINT 8: Memoria, Documentos e RAG Pessoal
    # Fluxos E2E reais + cobertura complementar de endpoints da sprint
    # Modulos: Documents, Memory, RAG
    ###

    @host = http://localhost:8000
@api_v1_prefix = /api/v1
@token = 
@admin_token = 
@correlation_id = {{$timestamp}}
@client_version = 2.0.0
@actor_user_id = 1
@user_id_int = 1
@user_id_str = 1
@target_user_id = 1
@conversation_id = conv-placeholder
@message_id = msg-placeholder
@goal_id = goal-placeholder
@run_id = 1
@task_id = task-placeholder
@agent_id = agent-placeholder
@doc_id = doc-placeholder
@experiment_id = 1
@arm_id = 1
@model_id = demo-model
@request_id = req-demo
@action_id = 1
@consent_id = 1
@queue_name = janus.knowledge.consolidation
@queue_name_missing = default


############################################
# 0) Preflight de autenticacao
############################################
# @name auth_local_me_preflight
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/auth/local/me
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Preflight auth/local/me: 200 e JSON", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200, "Forneca @token valido (auth/local/me != 200)");
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("application/json"));
});
try {
  const body = response.body.json();
  if (body && body.id) client.global.set("actor_user_id", String(body.id));
} catch (e) {}
%}
############################################
# Indice de endpoints cobertos nesta sprint
############################################
# - [Documents] POST /api/v1/documents/link-url
# - [Documents] GET /api/v1/documents/list
# - [Documents] GET /api/v1/documents/search
# - [Documents] GET /api/v1/documents/status/{doc_id}
# - [Documents] POST /api/v1/documents/upload
# - [Documents] DELETE /api/v1/documents/{doc_id}
# - [RAG] GET /api/v1/rag/hybrid_search
# - [RAG] GET /api/v1/rag/productivity
# - [RAG] GET /api/v1/rag/search
# - [RAG] GET /api/v1/rag/user-chat
# - [RAG] GET /api/v1/rag/user_chat
# - [unknown] GET /api/v1/memory/generative
# - [unknown] POST /api/v1/memory/generative
# - [unknown] GET /api/v1/memory/timeline

############################################
# 1) Documentos + Memoria + RAG (happy path)
############################################
# @name s8_docs_link_url
# DOCKER-SAFE: bloco desativado (mutacao/carga/external)
# POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/documents/link-url
# Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=----JanusBoundaryStatic
# X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
# User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
# Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
# X-User-Id: {{actor_user_id}}
#
# ------JanusBoundaryStatic
# Content-Disposition: form-data; name="url"
#
# https://example.com
# ------JanusBoundaryStatic
# Content-Disposition: form-data; name="conversation_id"
#
# {{conversation_id}}
# ------JanusBoundaryStatic--
#
# > {%
# client.test("documents/link-url: 200 ou 400", function() { client.assert([200,400].includes(response.status)); });
# try {
#   const b = response.body.json();
#   if (b.doc_id) client.global.set("doc_id", String(b.doc_id));
# } catch (e) {}
# %}
#
###

GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/documents/status/{{doc_id}}
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

###

    ###

    @host = http://localhost:8000
@api_v1_prefix = /api/v1

############################################

# User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
# Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
#

<file path="http/auto-analysis-test.http">
### Teste da Auto-Análise do Janus

# Testar endpoint de auto-análise
GET http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auto-analysis/health-check
Content-Type: application/json

###

# Testar se o endpoint está respondendo
GET http://localhost:8000/api/v1/system/status
Content-Type: application/json
</file>

<file path="http/Collaboration.http">
###
# Collaboration API
# Coleção para tarefas multi-agente e status do workspace
###

@host = http://localhost:8000
@api_v1_prefix = /api/v1

###
# Health do sistema de colaboração
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/health
Accept: application/json

###
# Listar agentes ativos
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/agents
Accept: application/json

###
# Criar tarefa
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/tasks/create
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "description": "Analisar fluxo de consolidação e publicar tarefa",
  "priority": "high",
  "dependencies": []
}

###
# Executar tarefa específica
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/tasks/execute
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "task_id": "<preencher id>",
  "agent_id": "<preencher agente>"
}

###
# Listar tarefas (opcional: filtrar por status)
@status = 
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/tasks?status={{status}}
Accept: application/json

###
# Detalhes de uma tarefa
@task_id = <preencher id>
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/tasks/{{task_id}}
Accept: application/json

###
# Executar múltiplas tarefas em paralelo respeitando dependências
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/tasks/execute_parallel
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "task_ids": null,
  "concurrency": 4
}

###
# Executar projeto completo
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/projects/execute
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "description": "Projeto de validação do fluxo end-to-end"
}

###
# Status do workspace
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/workspace/status
Accept: application/json

###
# Obter artefato do workspace
@artifact_key = last_consolidation_stats
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/workspace/artifacts/{{artifact_key}}
Accept: application/json

###
# Mensagens para um agente específico
@agent_id = <preencher agente>
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/workspace/messages/{{agent_id}}
Accept: application/json

###
# Solicitar shutdown do sistema
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/system/shutdown
Content-Type: application/json
</file>

<file path="http/E2E-Production-Scenario.http">
###
# E2E - Cenário de Produção Realista
# Fluxo completo com sucesso, falhas e edge cases
# Inclui headers, payloads e asserts com códigos de status
###

@host = http://localhost:8000
@api_v1_prefix = /api/v1
@token = 
@correlation_id = {{$timestamp}}
@client_version = 1.0.0

############################################
# 0) Pré-condições: Status inicial de workers
############################################
# @name workers_status_initial
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/workers/status
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Workers status inicial: 200 e JSON", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200);
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("application/json"));
});
%}

############################################
# 1) Workers: iniciar e validar falha de start duplicado
############################################
# @name workers_start_all
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/workers/start-all
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Workers start-all: sucesso 200 ou já-rodando 400", function() {
  client.assert([200, 400].includes(response.status), "esperado 200 ou 400");
});
%}

# @name workers_start_all_duplicate
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/workers/start-all
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Workers start-all duplicado: 400 problem+json", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 400);
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("problem+json"));
});
%}

############################################
# 2) Meta-Agent: health e heartbeat
############################################
# @name meta_health
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/meta-agent/health
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Meta health: 200 e JSON", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200);
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("application/json"));
});
%}

# @name meta_heartbeat_start
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/meta-agent/heartbeat/start
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

{
  "interval_minutes": 60
}

> {%
client.test("Heartbeat start: 200 e mensagem", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200);
  const body = response.body.json();
  client.assert(typeof body.message === "string");
});
%}

# @name meta_heartbeat_status
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/meta-agent/heartbeat/status
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Heartbeat status: 200 e inclui chave 'heartbeat_active'", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200);
  const body = response.body.json();
  client.assert(body.hasOwnProperty("heartbeat_active"));
});
%}

############################################
# 3) Colaboração: criar agentes e tarefas
############################################
# @name agent_create_coder
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/agents/create
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

{
  "role": "coder"
}

> {%
client.test("Criar agente coder: 201 e JSON com agent_id", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 201);
  const body = response.body.json();
  client.assert(typeof body.agent_id === "string");
  client.global.set("agent_id_coder", body.agent_id);
});
%}

# @name agent_create_tester
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/agents/create
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

{
  "role": "tester"
}

> {%
client.test("Criar agente tester: 201 e JSON com agent_id", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 201);
  const body = response.body.json();
  client.assert(typeof body.agent_id === "string");
  client.global.set("agent_id_tester", body.agent_id);
});
%}

# @name task_create_ok
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/tasks/create
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

{
  "description": "Validar pipeline de consolidação",
  "priority": "high",
  "assigned_to": "{{agent_id_coder}}",
  "dependencies": []
}

> {%
client.test("Criar tarefa válida: 200 e contém id", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200);
  const body = response.body.json();
  client.assert(typeof body.id === "string");
  client.global.set("task_id_ok", body.id);
});
%}

# @name task_create_invalid_priority
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/tasks/create
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

{
  "description": "Tarefa com prioridade inválida",
  "priority": "urgent",
  "dependencies": []
}

> {%
client.test("Criar tarefa inválida: 400 problem+json", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 400);
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("problem+json"));
});
%}

# @name tasks_list_invalid_status
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/tasks?status=invalid
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Listar tarefas com status inválido: 400 problem+json", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 400);
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("problem+json"));
});
%}

# @name task_details_ok
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/tasks/{{task_id_ok}}
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Detalhes da tarefa: 200 e inclui description", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200);
  const body = response.body.json();
  client.assert(typeof body.description === "string");
});
%}

# @name execute_task_not_found
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/tasks/execute
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

{
  "task_id": "task-inexistente",
  "agent_id": "{{agent_id_tester}}"
}

> {%
client.test("Executar tarefa inexistente: 404 problem+json", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 404);
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("problem+json"));
});
%}

# @name execute_parallel_all
POST {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/tasks/execute_parallel
Content-Type: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

{
  "task_ids": null,
  "concurrency": 4
}

> {%
client.test("Executar paralelo: 200 e inclui resultados", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 200);
  const body = response.body.json();
  client.assert(body.hasOwnProperty("results"));
});
%}

# @name workspace_messages_unknown_agent
GET {{host}}{{api_v1_prefix}}/collaboration/workspace/messages/agent_desconhecido
Accept: application/json
X-Request-ID: {{correlation_id}}
User-Agent: Janus-HTTP-Test/{{client_version}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

> {%
client.test("Mensagens agente inexistente: 404 problem+json", function() {
  client.assert(response.status === 404);
  client.assert((response.headers["content-type"] || "").toLowerCase().includes("problem+json"));
});
%}

# @name workspace_artifact_not_found
